name: Mending plate
description: Flat plate with a regular grid of through-holes. Lies flat on the bed (large face down).

parameters.label: Thickness
parameters.description: Plate thickness (Z); this face prints on the bed.

parameters.label: Holes along length (X)
parameters.description: Number of hole positions along the length direction. The generator caps this from plate length, hole diameter, and edge offsets so rows stay separated.

parameters.label: Holes along width (Y)
parameters.description: Number of hole positions along the width direction. The generator caps this from plate width, hole diameter, and edge offsets so rows stay separated.

parameters.label: Hole diameter
parameters.description: Used when "Custom" bolt size is selected.

parameters.label: Hole spacing X (0 = auto)
parameters.description: Fixed pitch along X; 0 spaces holes evenly between edge offsets.

parameters.label: Hole spacing Y (0 = auto)
parameters.description: Fixed pitch along Y; 0 uses even spacing.

parameters.label: Edge offset X
parameters.description: Target inset from the plate edge in X for the hole grid (may be increased to keep holes inside).

parameters.label: Edge offset Y
parameters.description: Target inset from the plate edge in Y for the hole grid.

parameters.label: Countersunk holes
parameters.description: Add a countersink on both faces for flat-head screws.

parameters.label: Slotted holes
parameters.description: Elongate holes along X for easier alignment.

parameters.label: Extra slot length
parameters.description: Additional length (mm) along X for each slot.

parameters.label: Minimum hole-to-edge
parameters.description: Minimum solid material between hole edge and plate edge.

parameters.label: XY hole compensation
parameters.description: Extra radius on printed holes for shrinkage/fit.
